prompt: A highly detailed traditional Chinese ink wash painting of an outdoor banquet. Across the top, an unrolled scroll displays Chinese calligraphy reading 君不見，黃河之水天上來. Below, a landscape features a waterfall and red sun on the left, and a full moon over a water pavilion on the right. In the foreground, 10 figures gather around a stone table. The central bearded man in white robes is standing and raising a wine cup to the sky. He is surrounded by 8 seated scholars drinking and 1 servant boy carrying a wine jar. The table holds fruit and metal pitchers. Large ceramic wine jars sit on the ground. On the left, 3 goats rest among rocks. In the background right, 1 figure rides a horse near pine trees.
